headline: Here's Why China is Urging Its Companies to Forgo Nvidia's Chips
summary: In a move to strengthen its semiconductor industry and counter U.S. sanctions, Beijing is reportedly encouraging Chinese firms to prioritize locally produced artificial intelligence (AI) chips over those from Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA).

headline: Tesla Could Report Slight Q3 Deliveries Miss Amid Musk's Political Controversies – Munster Explains Why It Won't Hurt The Stock
summary: Tesla is staring at a trio of catalysts that could have a bearing on the stock recovery that is underway and one of them materializes as early as early next week.

headline: Chinese Stocks Dominate - JD.com And Temu Parent PDD Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Gainers Last Week (Sept 23-Sept 27): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: China's central bank announced stimulus plans, boosting US-listed Chinese stocks. Top performers include JD, BEKE, PDD, LBRDA, YUMC, HTHT, TCOM, NIO, WYNN, BIDU, BABA, and LI.

headline: Regeneron Pharma, Super Micro Computer And Global Payments Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (Sept 23-Sept 27): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: 10 worst performing large-cap stocks last week: SMMT, MMYT, MEDP, REGN, GPN, AFRM, SMCI, FTI, FCNCA, NOW. Are they in your portfolio?

headline: Consumer Tech News (Sept 23- Sept 27): OpenAI pitched President Biden For Expansion Of Data Centers, Apple Discontinued iPhone 15 And 13 Models & More
summary: UAE President meets Biden to discuss AI cooperation. OpenAI pushes for expansion of data centers. SAG-AFTRA strikes against League of Legends. Sony celebrates PlayStation's 30th anniversary with limited edition consoles. Ubisoft delays Assassin's Creed Shadows, SkyBox Labs lays off employees, and Steam sets a new record for concurrent players.

headline: Musk's Displeasure With Sam Altman, Gates' AI Love, And Bezos' New Challenge: This Week In AI
summary: From Elon Musk expressing his concerns over OpenAI's transition to a for-profit entity to Bill Gates singing praises of AI chatbot ChatGPT, the tech titans kept us on our toes.

headline: Apple Bowing Out Of OpenAI Funding Round, iPhone 16's Camera Ranking, And More: This Week In Appleverse
summary: The last week was a whirlwind for Apple, with news ranging from the tech giant's withdrawal from OpenAI's funding round to the iPhone 16 Pro Max's camera failing to top global rankings.
